hero.title: Creative Full Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: Driven by clean code and real impact.

about.title: NICE TO MEET YOU!
about.name: Echadani Yassine
about.bio: I'm Echadani Yassine, a Full Stack Developer from Temara, Morocco, skilled in JavaScript (React, Node.js) and PHP (Laravel). I build responsive web and mobile apps, with experience in e-commerce, CMS (WordPress, PrestaShop), and MERN stack and Laravel projects. Passionate about clean code, Agile practices, and continuous learning.

experience.title: Everything about me!
experience.education1_details: High school diploma in Life and Earth Sciences with a focus on scientific studies.
experience.education2_details: A comprehensive Full Stack Web Development diploma program covering front-end and back-end technologies, databases, and agile methodologies.
experience.work1_details: Contributed to real-world web development projects, including interactive ReactJS landing pages, dynamic PhaserJS games, Shopify stores, and full MERN stack e-commerce applications.
experience.work2_details: Working on PHP Laravel-based applications and developing websites using CMS platforms including WordPress and PrestaShop. Focused on building scalable, maintainable web solutions and customizing CMS themes and plugins.

services.title: My Skills!
services.webDev_desc: Tailor-made websites built from scratch using modern technologies like Laravel, React, and Node.js.
services.cms_desc: Professional websites developed using WordPress and PrestaShop, including theme customization and plugin integration.
services.ecommerce_desc: Secure and responsive online stores built with Laravel, PrestaShop, or Shopify, optimized for user experience and conversions.
services.api_desc: Development and integration of RESTful APIs to connect applications and enable seamless data flow.
services.maintenance_desc: Ongoing support, performance enhancements, bug fixing, and SEO improvements for existing websites.
services.uiux_desc: Responsive and user-friendly interfaces developed from Figma or custom designs using HTML, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript.

testimonials.title: What Collaborators Say?
testimonials.testimonial1: Working with Yassine on the DonatBlood project was a game-changer. He took our vision and turned it into a scalable, well-structured Laravel backend using React. His problem-solving skills and dedication to quality are second to none.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: I'm currently available to take on new projects, so feel free to send me a message about anything that you want to run past me. You can contact me anytime 24/7.
